description: Production-safe chaos engineering with blast radius control, rollback validation, RTO/RPO truth verification

blast_radius_levels.SAFE_DRY_RUN: Default — no actual chaos injected, simulates scenarios

safety_rules: Default blast radius is SAFE_DRY_RUN — no production impact
CHAOS_TESTING_ENABLED env var required for any non-dry-run
Rollback must be validated before chaos window is marked complete
RPO_AUDIT_TRAIL = 0 seconds — audit trail can never be lost
status: ARCHITECTURE_READY — set CHAOS_TESTING_ENABLED=true to enable live chaos injection
